title: Game
description: Schema for a game definition. The file name (its slug, without the .yaml extension) is the identifier templates reference via their game_id field.

name.description: Human-readable display name of the game (e.g. 'Minecraft', 'Counter-Strike 2')

logo_url.description: Optional URL to the game's logo artwork (SteamGridDB CDN URL carried over from the legacy game-service)

hero_url.description: Optional URL to the game's hero/banner artwork (SteamGridDB CDN URL carried over from the legacy game-service)

external_game_id.description: Optional SteamGridDB numeric game id. Single source of truth for the legacy numeric id; used to resolve templates whose game_id is still numeric.
